text.title: Image Generation Basics Failure Modes
text.summary: Five recurring failures in DALL-E 3 / Flux / SDXL pipelines.

antipattern.symptom: Generated images don't match the prompt; reviewer cannot diagnose why.
antipattern.root-cause: response.revised_prompt was not logged; no audit trail of what DALL-E 3 actually saw.
antipattern.fix: Always persist response.revised_prompt next to the image and input prompt (rule r2).

antipattern.symptom: Batch pipeline hits 404s on image URLs an hour after generation.
antipattern.root-cause: URL was cached for later download; DALL-E URLs expire ~1h.
antipattern.fix: Download bytes to durable storage within the same call; never cache the URL (rule r3).

antipattern.symptom: Two agents share one org key; both throttled at 2.5 imgs/min instead of 5.
antipattern.root-cause: Rate limits are per-org, not per-key; sharing splits the budget.
antipattern.fix: Track org-level concurrent calls in a shared counter; back off cooperatively (rule r4).

antipattern.symptom: OpenAI returns content_policy_violation for celebrity / real-person prompts.
antipattern.root-cause: Prompt requested real-person likeness; OpenAI policy blocks this.
antipattern.fix: Filter prompts for real-person names upstream; refer to subjects by role (e.g. "a doctor", not "Dr. House").

antipattern.symptom: Generated image has garbled text on it; product copy unreadable.
antipattern.root-cause: All current generators struggle with on-image text rendering.
antipattern.fix: Composite text via post-processing (Pillow / Canvas); never trust the model to render text.
